heading: Procedure
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo create or update a Datadog integration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas integrations create DATADOG [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas integrations create DATADOG](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-create-DATADOG).**Ui:**Atlas UITo configure an Atlas integration with Datadog using the
Atlas UI:* Click Configure for the Datadog integration card.

* Enter your Datadog API (Application Programming Interface) key in the input box.

* Select your API (Application Programming Interface) region.

  Atlas supports the following Datadog regions in the
  Atlas UI:

  - `US1`

  - `US3`

  - `US5`

  - `EU1`

  - `AP1`

  Datadog uses `US1` by default.

  To learn more about Datadog's regions, see [Datadog Sites](https://docs.datadoghq.com/getting_started/site/).

* (Optional) To enable database metrics tracking, toggle
  Send Database Metrics to On.

* (Optional) To enable collection latency metrics tracking,
  toggle Send Collection Latency Metrics to
  On.

* (Optional) To enable query shape metrics tracking,
  toggle Send Query Shape Metrics to
  On.

* Click Save.
